ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the business location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the business location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the business */,
  "cuisine_types" TEXT /* Types of cuisine offered by the business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the business being reviewed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Textual feedback provided by the user */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., food, service, ambiance) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User identifier who submitted the review */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the review (e.g., affordable, family-friendly) */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images attached to the review */,
  "videos" TEXT /* Videos attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user submitting the review */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback metric entry */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* The review associated with this metric */,
  "cool" INTEGER /* Count of 'cool' votes for the review */,
  "useful" INTEGER /* Count of 'useful' votes for the review */,
  "funny" INTEGER /* Count of 'funny' votes for the review */,
  "spam" INTEGER /* Count of 'spam' reports for the review */,
  "abuse" INTEGER /* Count of 'abuse' reports for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_metrics_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* The review that this response corresponds to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* The text of the response provided by the business */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* The date when the response was made */,
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Admin identifier who made the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* The review associated with this rating */,
  "food_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for food (1-5) */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for service (1-5) */,
  "ambiance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for ambiance (1-5) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for value (1-5) */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* The business associated with this category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Cafe, Restaurant, Food Truck) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* The business for which this report is generated */,
  "average_stars" REAL /* Average star rating calculated from reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating calculated from reviews */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review related to the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., moderator, super-admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_admins" (
  "business_admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business-admin pair */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* The business associated with this admin */,
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Admin identifier who manages this business */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., owner, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_admins_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_admins_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* The review associated with this flag */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag (e.g., spam, harassment) */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* The review associated with this comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User identifier who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_tags" (
  "business_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business-tag pair */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* The business associated with this tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Tag identifier associated with this business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_tags_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
